ai_summary: Marine Electricals (India) Limited has filed a standard compliance certificate to the National Stock Exchange, confirming adherence to SEBI Regulation 74(5) for the quarter ended June 30, 2026. The filing, via their Registrar & Share Transfer Agent, verifies that all securities received for dematerialization were processed correctly, physical certificates cancelled, and the register of members updated timely. This indicates proper corporate governance regarding share registry operations and presents no material impacts or red flags.
